zh.Stapleford, Cambridgeshire, England: 英國英格蘭坎布利其爾斯塔普利福德
zh.lifeSummary: John Ansell於大約1553年出生在英國艾可貝爾豪斯。他於1578年與Agnes Tiler結婚。他們至少是6個兒子和2個女兒的父母。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: John Ansell于大约1553年出生在英国艾可貝爾豪斯。他于1578年与Agnes Tiler结婚。他们至少是6个儿子和2个女儿的父母。

nameMeanings.name: Ansell
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: from a vernacular form of the personal name Anselmus (ancient Germanic Anshelm, Old French Anselm). See Anselm .
Americanized form of German and Jewish (Ashkenazic)   Ansel  .
Swedish: from an unexplained first element + the suffix -ell, a derivative of the Latin adjectival ending -elius.

variants.name: Hansell
meanings: English: variant of Ansell with prosthetic H-.
In some cases probably an altered form of   Hansel   1 or 3.

variants.name: Anselm
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  German Klaus, Heinz.

English and German: from the ancient Germanic personal name Anshelm, composed of the elements ans- ‘god’ + helm ‘protection, helmet’. The personal name was taken to France and England by St. Anselm (c. 1033–1109), known as the Father of Scholasticism. He was born in Aosta, Italy, joined the Benedictine order at Bec in Normandy, France, and in 1093 became archbishop of Canterbury, England.

nameMeanings.name: John
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: form of   John  , also used quite frequently in the English-speaking world. In Northern Ireland it is sometimes found as a variant of   Ewan .

historicEvents.title: Act of Uniformity
historicEvents.description: The Act of Uniformity was passed by the Parliament of England and required all people to go to church once a week. The consequence of not attending church was a fine of 12 pence, which was a considerable amount for a poor person.

historicEvents.title: State Lottery
historicEvents.description: A State Lottery was recorded in 1569. The tickets were sold at St. Paul's Cathedral in London.

historicEvents.title: The First English Colony is Established in America
historicEvents.description: England established its first colony in North America in 1585 as a way to generate additional wealth. The colony was named Virginia, after the virgin Queen Elizabeth I.

historicEvents.title: Elizabeth I Signs Death Warrant for Mary, Queen of Scots
historicEvents.description: Elizabeth I signed the death warrant for Mary, Queen of Scots, on February 1, 1587, as she was found guilty of plotting to assasinate Elizabeth. Mary, Queen of Scots, was beheaded at Fotheringhay Castle in England on February 8, 1587.
historicEvents.urlTitle: Elizabeth I.org - Mary Queen of Scots

historicEvents.title: The Pilgrims Board the Mayflower
historicEvents.description: "The Pilgrims boarded the Mayflower in search of religious freedom in the New World in September 1620. The Mayflower set sail from Plymouth, England, with 102 passengers, 40 of whom called themselves ""Saints."" After two stormy months at sea, the ship reached the New World. Nearly half of the group died during their first winter due to malnutrition and the harsh New England winter."

historicEvents.title: The English Civil War
historicEvents.description: A series of conflicts regarding England's governance during the years 1642 to 1651 is now known as The English Civil War. Charles I summoned supporters to join him against his enemies in Parliament. In October 1642, nearly 10,000 men fought for Charles I and chased Parliament across the River Tamar. Fighting continued for years and was finally ended at the Battle of Worcester on September 3, 1651, with a Parliamentarian victory.

en.lifeSummary: John Ansell was born about 1553, in Bellhouse, Essex, England. He married Agnes Tiler in 1578. They were the parents of at least 6 sons and 2 daughters.

fr.lifeSummary: John Ansell est né environ 1553, à Bellhouse, Essex, Angleterre. Il a épousé Agnes Tiler en 1578. Ils ont eu au moins 6 fils et 2 filles.

de.lifeSummary: John Ansell wurde um 1553 in Bellhouse, Essex, England geboren. Er hat 1578 Agnes Tiler geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 6 Söhne und 2 Töchter.

it.lifeSummary: John Ansell è nato il circa 1553 nel Bellhouse, Essex, England. Lui sposato Agnes Tiler nel 1578. Erano genitori di almeno 6 figli e 2 figlie.

ja.lifeSummary: John Ansellは約1553年にイギリスエセックスベルハウゼで生まれた。1578年にAgnes Tilerと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも6人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。

ko.lifeSummary: John Ansell(은)는 대략 1553년 영국 에세스 브하스에서 태어났다. 그는 1578년 Agnes Tiler(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 여섯 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다.

pt.lifeSummary: John Ansell nasceu aproximadamente 1553, em Bellhouse, Essex, Inglaterra. Ele casou-se com Agnes Tiler em 1578. Eles tiveram pelo menos 6 filhos e 2 filhas.

ru.lifeSummary: John Ansell родился около 1553 г. в местности беллхоус, эссекс, Англия. Он женился на женщине по имени Agnes Tiler в 1578 г. У них было по крайней мере 6 сыновей и 2 дочери.

es.lifeSummary: John Ansell nació aproximadamente 1553, en Bellhouse, Essex, Inglaterra. Se casó con Agnes Tiler en 1578. Fueron padres de por lo menos 6 hijos y 2 hijas.
